items.title: 30th Celebration set officially revealed

product.name: 30th Celebration Pokémon Center Elite Trainer Box

facts: The expansion was announced for a worldwide September 16 release.
items.expectedAction: Create an early watch; exact products and preorder timing are not yet confirmed.

items.title: 30th Celebration product lineup confirms Pokémon Center ETB

product.name: 30th Celebration Pokémon Center Elite Trainer Box

facts: The product lineup includes a Pokémon Center-exclusive Elite Trainer Box.
items.expectedAction: Raise a prepare alert and begin conservative monitoring of permitted sources.

items.title: 30th Celebration Tech Sticker Collection confirms Alolan Exeggutor version
facts: The official product gallery confirms the collection and its Alolan Exeggutor version.
No Canadian preorder date was announced.
items.expectedAction: Create a product-confirmed watch while Canadian timing remains unknown.

items.title: 30th Celebration Tech Sticker Collection confirms Lucario version
facts: The official product gallery confirms the collection and its Lucario version.
No Canadian preorder date was announced.
items.expectedAction: Create a product-confirmed watch while Canadian timing remains unknown.

items.title: 30th Celebration Ultra-Premium Collection—Day confirmed
facts: The official product gallery confirms the Day version and a November 6 launch.
No Canadian preorder date is published.
items.expectedAction: Create a product-confirmed watch and monitor permitted Canadian sources for preorder evidence.

items.title: 30th Celebration Ultra-Premium Collection—Night confirmed
facts: The official product gallery confirms the Night version and a November 6 launch.
No Canadian preorder date is published.
items.expectedAction: Create a product-confirmed watch and monitor permitted Canadian sources for preorder evidence.

items.title: Mega Evolution—Pitch Black announced for July 17, 2026
facts: The official Pokémon announcement gives July 17, 2026 as the expansion release date.
items.expectedAction: Track Canadian retail availability around the official July 17 release.
